text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I thought I could pull out a decent
performance—at least, that's what I'm good
at—but I couldn't even manage that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I have to accept that this is all I can
do now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, on the bright side, I learned what I need to
work on! Look forward to the next episode!
Hahaha.
choice_data_list: Yeah! I believe in you, Nature!
Yeah! I believe in you, Nature!
You don't have to hide your frustration.
You don't have to hide your frustration.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, on the bright side, I learned what I need to
work on! Look forward to the next episode!
Hahaha.
choice_data_list: Yeah! I believe in you, Nature!
Yeah! I believe in you, Nature!
You don't have to hide your frustration.
You don't have to hide your frustration.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're too confident. I haven't done
anything to earn that trust.
choice_data_list: But I do believe in you! Honest!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know. You're always telling me as much with that
silver tongue of yours.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I'm not the type to be motivated
with just talk.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But well... Maybe I could try believing in those
words a little.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You've got it all wrong. I'm not trying to hide
anything. It's just that being frustrated won't
make me any faster.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it would be really out of character for me to
be frustrated...
choice_data_list: Then I'll be frustrated for you!
Then I'll be frustrated for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Hold on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What are you doing?! Is that supposed to be how I'm feeling? Stop expressing my frustration so aggressively!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heh... All right, all right, I'll try.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you to scream like that again, after
all. Still, no promises!
